StarSelection.title: Star Selection
StarSelection.description: A user's selected star and their IP address.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user.

starId.description: The ID of the star chosen (e.g., 'gold-siph').

ip.description: The IP address of the user at the time of selection.

position.description: Randomized position on screen for this user's star.

/stars/{userId}.description: Collection of star selections, keyed by user ID to enforce one star per user.
